summary: M6-ALPHA-SYSTEM-CONTRACT-001 is CLOSED after PR #131 passed CI, was merged, and entered main. The bounded M6 Alpha system-complete contract is now the accepted planning basis for downstream M6 tasks. Next dependency-ready M6 tasks are M6-DIPLOMACY-LEGITIMACY-001 and M6-SCENARIO-DATA-PIPELINE-001; lead will start M6-DIPLOMACY-LEGITIMACY-001 after this closure checkpoint enters main.

tests_run.result: Quality, Web, and Browser Smoke passed; Windows Desktop Smoke Artifact passed.
After PR #131 merge, M6-DIPLOMACY-LEGITIMACY-001 and M6-SCENARIO-DATA-PIPELINE-001 are dependency-ready.

decisions: CLOSED: Accepted M6 Alpha contract entered main through PR #131.
Do not start downstream work until this closure checkpoint enters main.
Choose M6-DIPLOMACY-LEGITIMACY-001 as the next highest-priority dependency-ready M6 task, while M6-SCENARIO-DATA-PIPELINE-001 remains also dependency-ready.
Preserve DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE and all Human Gates.
risks: Untracked ui-samples/ exists and remains unrelated, unstaged, and untouched.
Downstream M6 work must not expand the accepted Alpha contract into M7 content lock, M8 release hardening, full diplomacy, server/multiplayer, telemetry, or manual node battle.
requested_action: Open and merge closure PR, sync main, then start M6-DIPLOMACY-LEGITIMACY-001 with a simulation_engineer writer.
